project.name: Lumisky
project.description: Production-grade Android live wallpaper application using Kotlin, MVVM, Compose, and OpenGL ES rendering.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Contains developer instructions, project rules, context management practices, and guidelines for wallpaper optimization and safe development.

nodes.name: ARCHITECTURE.md

nodes.summary: Pulls snapshot images generated by the Android wallpaper preview activity to the host system and triggers WebP synchronization.

nodes.name: wait_timeout
nodes.summary: Checks the marker status one final time upon timing out, then exits with an error indicating snapshot generation failed.

nodes.name: probe_marker_ready
nodes.summary: Queries the Android shell to verify if the snapshot completion marker file has been written with a success status.

tour.title: Project Architecture & Layout
tour.description: Start with ARCHITECTURE.md to explore the system's modular architecture: app (UI and assets), core (shared logic), engine (OpenGL ES structures), and wallpaper (WallpaperService).

tour.title: Application Configuration & Core Settings
tour.description: Examine how app configurations, key properties, and preferences are structured in the core layer via AppSettingsRepository.

tour.title: Daylight Tracking & API Integration
tour.description: Investigate SunTimesRepository and SunTimesApiClient, which fetch dynamic sunrise/sunset cycles using geographical data for astronomical shading.

tour.title: Celestial Calculations & Astronomy Math
tour.description: Deep dive into CelestialCalculator, which handles astronomical math to compute sun/moon positions, orbits, and phases relative to the observer's location.

tour.title: OpenGL ES Rendering Pipeline
tour.description: Understand the core GLES drawing surface loop by studying SkyRenderer and BaseRenderer, which initialize coordinates and manage shaders.

tour.title: WallpaperService & EGL Context Setup
tour.description: Explore SkyWallpaperService, the critical Android service bridge that binds the OpenGL renderer to the live wallpaper surface on the home screen.

tour.title: Vsync Thread Rendering & Battery Saving
tour.description: Examine RenderThreadVsyncLoop and FramePacingClock, which regulate the drawing frequency based on refresh rate and screen states to optimize battery life.

tour.title: Dynamic Sky Shader & Wallpaper Manifests
tour.description: See the GLSL fragment shader that performs gradient calculation and sky coloring, and index.json which catalogues the app's available wallpapers.

tour.title: Catalog Models & State Management
tour.description: Analyze WallpaperManifestCatalogSource and HomeViewModel to learn how live wallpaper assets and settings are loaded and presented as UI state.

tour.title: Settings & Celestial Timeline UI
tour.description: Inspect the Compose settings view and the SettingsCelestialTimeline widget, allowing users to customize latitude, longitude, and timezone offsets manually.

tour.title: MainActivity Launcher Flow
tour.description: Review MainActivity, the primary launcher coordinating location permissions, starting background cache warming, and invoking the system wallpaper set intent.

tour.title: Performance Audits & GPU Optimizations
tour.description: Conclude the tour by reviewing OPTIMIZATIONS.md, which contains audits on home screen scrolling smoothness, shader profiling, and validation plans.
